description: Free Bonuses inside: Soccer Drills Video , Demonstrated By A Young Up And Coming Pro Playing For Inter Barcelona FC Soccer Club In Spain! +3 PDF's: Game Changer Playbook/Tracker, Sports Snapshots: Fun Facts for Young Champions, Positive Mindset For Young Champions! Discover the amazing stories behind the world’s greatest soccer players with this fun & educational book for young champions! Are you searching for an unforgettable collection of true stories about amazing goals and unbelievable wins? Do you want to inspire kids with the value of perseverance, teamwork, and leadership? Do you want to uncover how the best world class your favorite players achieved their rise to stardom? Then this book is for you. Bursting with epic and educational soccer stories for aspiring champions , this book encourages and motivates young players to hit the field and score more goals with inspiring real-life stories about their favorite soccer icons. With stories about the many triumphs and setbacks behind world-renowned players like Lionel Messi, Jamal Musiala, Paulo Dybala, and Diego Maradona, Inspirational Soccer Stories For Kids reveals the essential qualities that propelled them to stardom. Plus, with fun discussion questions that foster introspection and self-awareness, this book challenges young readers to develop the qualities that will make them better players and more well-rounded individuals. Book details: Inspires Young Athletes With Astonishing Stories From Their Favorite Players, From Christiano Ronaldo, Lionel Messi To Pele, Diego Maradona & More Shares Valuable Moral Lessons & Sports Virtues That Reveal How Soccer Champions Rose To Fame & Triumphed Over Adversity Fosters Personal Growth By Encouraging Kids To Develop Traits Like Teamwork, Leadership, Resilience, Patience, Good Sportsmanship, & Unshakeable Determination Highlights The Many Unique Eras & Play Styles In Football, Fostering a Deeper Knowledge & Appreciation For The Sport And Much More! Whether your child is an avid soccer player or a fan who loves the game, Inspirational Soccer Stories for Kids is a brilliant way for parents, educators, and sports coaches to instill positive growth in the next generation. Are you ready to learn how your favorite soccer players can help show how to you be a champion in sports and life? Then scroll up and click the “buy now” button today! Read more
